calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: MITCHELL WONG, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court ordered the case dismissed with the court retaining jurisdiction C.C.P. 664.6. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to August 12, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

After Hearing, the Court vacates the Order to Show Cause scheduled for August 12, 2025, and re-sets the matter for October 14, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To May-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to May 13, 2025 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
